name: |-Prismarine Colossus-| (Minecraft Story Mode)
description:
“I placed every block you’ve ever stood on, and I promise, I will place the blocks that cover your grave!”

So this big blockhead is said to be the Admin that built your world. And now he’s challenged you to a battle, where you have to beat him. The question is, how are you gonna do that and why are you gonna do that?

Silly you, you have a gauntlet that’s made of the same materials as him, and you gotta punch him in the back of the head one time, and he dies instantly.
creator: IGottaSwitchNamesMan
